creator: shawn.webb@hardenedbsd.org
text:
A Russian PDF was allowed to be posted on the freebsd-ports mailing list today. Given how prevalent PDFs embedded with malware are, is allowing PDFs to be posted on a public mailing list a good idea?

Link to the mailing list post: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2016-July/104158.html
